subcodes.first_line: O steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God, thou art sheltered beneath the shadow of the grace of the One Lord and art favoured by the bounties of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله در ظل عنایت حضرت احدیت مستظلی و بالطاف حضرت رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
